reply:
(1) This device is a Square D Motor Control Center Panel MCC-003. It's used to control and protect motors in industrial applications.

(2) The most probable fault cause is a motor not receiving the correct power or the control circuit malfunctioning.

(3) The tech should check the power supply and control circuit for any obvious issues. If the fault persists, a tech should consult the MCC manual for troubleshooting steps.
